message:
feat(whatsapp,teams): webhook handler + Teams connector foundation (j05nu.1.4, j05nu.1.6.3)

WhatsApp (j05nu.1.4): Add webhook.rs module with HMAC-SHA256 signature
verification (X-Hub-Signature-256), Meta challenge-response verification,
typed event parsing for all message types (text, image, video, audio,
document, location, contacts, interactive) and status updates (sent,
delivered, read, failed), replay detection via message ID dedup, dead
letter queue, and phone number redaction for logging. Adds webhook_verify
and webhook_receive operations to connector introspection.

Teams (j05nu.1.6.3): New Microsoft Teams connector with typed foundation
covering Graph API (teams, channels, messages, chats, members) and Bot
Framework activity types. Includes TeamsConfig with access_token,
client_credentials, and credential_id auth modes. TeamsClient with
wiremock-tested HTTP methods. TeamsError with ConnectorErrorMapping impl
covering Graph error codes (401/403/404/429/5xx), rate limiting with
retry-after extraction, and full FcpError taxonomy mapping.

89 WhatsApp tests + 56 Teams tests = 145 new tests, all clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-teams"
+description = "Microsoft Teams connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_teams"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-teams"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-sdk = { path = "../../crates/fcp-sdk" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+chrono.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+uuid.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
